summary: Iran has developed the subsonic loitering air defense missile Missile 358, equipped with compact turbojet engines and a thermal imaging homing head, which has proven highly effective against Israeli Hermes-900 reconnaissance and strike UAVs, even in low-visibility conditions. On the battlefield, Ukrainian drone operators are struggling to meet the Defense Ministry's target of eliminating 50,000 Russian troops per month due to a reduced number of enemy forces within operational range, suggesting a possible decline in Russian manpower availability. Analysts emphasize the need to extend the kill zone deeper into Russian-held territory to sustain operational pressure.
